name: Portal Copy
description: Copy files between workspace and portal paths, or between portals. Supports large binary files.

function.name: portal_copy
function.description: Copy a file from source to destination. Paths can be workspace paths (relative or absolute within your working directory) or portal paths (/_portal/...). Supports binary files of any size. For files larger than 10MB, the transfer runs in the background and a job_id is returned — poll with copy_status(job_id) to check progress.

source.description: Source file path. Use /_portal/<name>/... for portal files, or a workspace-relative path for files in your working directory.

destination.description: Destination file path. Use /_portal/<name>/... for portal files, or a workspace-relative path for files in your working directory.
